name: kbackup
description: KBackup is an application which lets you back up your data in a simple, user friendly way. Features: - Using profile files with definitions for Folders and files to be included or excluded from the backup - The backup target can be either a locally mounted device like a ZIP drive, USB stick, etc. or any remote URL - Running automated backups without using a graphical user interface This tool is part of the KDE Utils Suite.
